chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1254 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5298/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.02.2024 Mr. Sikandar Ali Junejo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Ameer Ali Shah (on behalf of DIGP Sukkur), SIP Ali Murad Narejo (on behalf of SSP Khairpur) and ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto (on behalf of SSP Sukkur)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Compliance report has been submitted by learned AAG along with appointment order of the petitioner, which has been confirmed by learned Counsel for petitioner and petitioner herself. Petition, having served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
